subcodes.first_line: O thou spiritual youth, thou illumined child! Arise and advance toward the horizon of the Merciful, supplicating to the Supreme Kingdom
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفتی الروحانی و الولد النورانی قم مقبلا الی الافق الرحمانی متضرعا الی الملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
